sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ryanair Holdings PLC (NASDAQ:RYAAY) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Ryanair Holdings PLC (NASDAQ:RYAAY) saw a significant 20.5% decrease in short interest in April, dropping to 1,729,227 shares, representing about 0.3% of shares outstanding. The short-interest ratio is low at 1.3 days to cover. The company recently reported strong earnings, beating analyst estimates with $0.26 EPS and $3.77 billion in revenue, and holds a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $75.67.

feed.title: [144] SANMINA CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details a Form 144 SEC filing by Sanmina Corp (SANM) on April 30, 2026, which indicates a proposed sale of 2,275 shares of common stock with an aggregate market value of $484,120. The securities were acquired as restricted stock on April 15, 2026. The filing has a neutral impact and sentiment according to Stock Titan.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] SANMINA CORP Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a passive investment in Sanmina Corp (SANM), reporting beneficial ownership of 2,761,534 shares, which represents 5.05% of the company's common stock as of March 31, 2026. The Schedule 13G filing indicates that this is a passive investment, with sole voting power for 409,342 shares and sole dispositive power over all 2,761,534 shares, distributed across various Vanguard entities and managed accounts. This disclosure provides transparency into institutional holdings without suggesting activist intent.

feed.title: Sonic Automotive (SAH) director receives 2,916-share restricted stock grant
feed.summary: Sonic Automotive director William R. Brooks received a grant of 2,916 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 30, 2026, as part of the company's 2012 Formula Restricted Stock and Deferral Plan for Non-Employee Directors. These shares were granted at $0.00 per share and represent compensation rather than an open-market purchase. Following this transaction, Brooks directly holds 117,898 shares of Class A Common Stock in Sonic Automotive.

feed.title: [Form 4] SONIC AUTOMOTIVE INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Sonic Automotive director Michael Edward Hodge reported the acquisition of 3,608 shares of Class A Common Stock as restricted stock units on April 30, 2026. This grant was issued at no cash cost as compensation under a deferral plan for non-employee directors, rather than an open-market purchase. Following this transaction, Hodge directly holds 21,415 shares of Sonic Automotive Class A Common Stock.

feed.title: Director Marcus G. Smith receives 4,373 Sonic (SAH) Class A shares as grant
feed.summary: Sonic Automotive director Marcus G. Smith was granted 4,373 Class A shares as part of the company's 2012 Formula-Restricted-Stock-Plan for non-employee directors. This transaction, a grant rather than an open-market trade, increases his direct holdings to 104,494 shares. Smith also indirectly holds 836,534 Class A shares through OBS Family, LLC, disclaiming beneficial ownership except for his pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Sonic Automotive (SAH) director granted 3,061 restricted stock units
feed.summary: Sonic Automotive (SAH) director Keri A. Kaiser was granted 3,061 restricted stock units (RSUs) of Class A Common Stock, as reported in a Form 4 filing. This equity award, granted at $0.00 per share, increases her direct holdings to 25,470 shares. The grant was made under the company's 2012 Formula Restricted Stock and Deferral Plan for Non-Employee Directors.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital reports 17.47M shares of SentinelOne (NYSE: S) in 13G filing
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management disclosed a passive investment in SentinelOne Inc. (NYSE: S), reporting beneficial ownership of 17,468,471 common stock shares, representing 5.23% of the class. The Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 2,524,389 shares. This disclosure highlights Vanguard's significant institutional stake, managed across its various funds and accounts, without signaling any intent for active corporate control.

feed.title: Seabridge Gold's KSM Project Named a Priority Project by the Province of British Columbia
feed.summary: The Province of British Columbia has designated Seabridge Gold's KSM Project as a provincial priority project due to its potential for job creation and significant mineral reserves. This designation will provide dedicated permitting coordination and support, streamlining timelines for one of the world's largest undeveloped copper and gold projects. The project aligns with British Columbia's "Look West" strategy, emphasizing economic security and responsible natural resource development.

feed.title: B.C. backs KSM project with 47.3M ounces of gold, 7.3B lb copper
feed.summary: The Province of British Columbia has designated Seabridge Gold's KSM Project as a provincial priority, aiming to streamline and expedite permitting for the massive undeveloped copper-gold project. KSM hosts significant reserves, including 47.3 million ounces of gold and 7.3 billion pounds of copper, positioning it as a key source of critical minerals. This designation aligns with B.C.'s "Look West" strategy, focusing on delivering major projects and strengthening economic security, with Seabridge committed to continued engagement with Indigenous and local communities.

feed.title: BlackRock (LON: RTO) holds 175.1M shares, 6.9% stake reported
feed.summary: BlackRock Portfolio Management LLC has filed an amended Schedule 13G, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 175,098,972 shares, representing a 6.9% stake in Rentokil Initial plc (RTO). The filing details BlackRock's sole voting power over 162,993,738 shares and sole dispositive power over 175,098,972 shares, categorizing this as a passive institutional holding in accordance with SEC regulations. This amendment confirms BlackRock's significant, though non-controlling, investment in the company.

feed.title: Royalty Pharma (RPRX) CFO sells 34,791 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Royalty Pharma plc EVP & CFO Terrance P. Coyne sold 34,791 Class A Ordinary Shares on April 28, 2026, at a weighted average price of $49.7784 per share. These sales were conducted through entities TPC RP EPA1 LLC and TPC RP 2021, LLC, under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted in August 2025. The transaction is described as a routine liquidity event rather than an indicator of a change in corporate outlook.

feed.title: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) Price Target Raised to $13.00 at Royal Bank Of Canada
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has increased its price target for Ford Motor (NYSE:F) to $13.00, up from $11.00, while maintaining a "sector perform" rating. This adjustment comes after Ford reported stronger-than-expected Q1 earnings, with EPS of $0.66 against a consensus of $0.22, and a 6.4% year-over-year revenue increase. Despite raising its 2026 profit outlook due to a one-time tariff refund, investor caution remains due to ongoing EV losses and rising material costs impacting profitability.

feed.title: Royal Bank Of Canada Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Nabors Industries (NYSE:NBR) Stock
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has increased its price target for Nabors Industries (NYSE: NBR) from $91 to $120, suggesting a potential upside of 17.55%, while maintaining a "sector perform" rating. This adjustment follows Nabors beating quarterly earnings estimates, though the company still faces challenges with negative return on equity and anticipated negative EPS for the fiscal year. Institutional investors show significant ownership in NBR despite a mixed "Hold" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: EBIT per share of RMR Group, Inc. Class A – GETTEX:26R
feed.summary: This article provides financial data for RMR Group, Inc. Class A (GETTEX:26R), specifically focusing on its EBIT per share. It details the company's financial overview, including period value, change, and change percentage. The data is sourced from ICE Data Services, FactSet, and Quartr.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] ROGERS CORP Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G, disclosing a passive investment in Rogers Corp (ROG). As of March 31, 2026, Vanguard beneficially owns 925,075 shares, representing 5.18% of the common stock. This filing indicates that Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 126,871 shares.

feed.title: [144] ROGERS CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details a Form 144 SEC filing by ROGERS CORP (ROG) on April 30, 2026, indicating a proposed sale of 3,978 shares of common stock by an individual for an aggregate market value of $536,743. The shares were acquired on December 13, 2022, through an RSU/PSU/ESPP equity compensation plan. The filing is categorized as neutral in impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Forager Fund (NYSE: RM) trims Regional Management stake with open-market sales
feed.summary: Forager Fund, L.P., a ten percent owner of Regional Management Corp. (RM), has reduced its stake through open-market sales. The fund sold a total of 5,017 shares across two days in late April 2026, realizing approximately $195,445 from these transactions. Following these sales, Forager Fund still holds 948,458 shares of Regional Management common stock.

feed.title: Regal Rexnord Shareholders Back Board, Pay, and Auditor
feed.summary: Regal Rexnord (RRX) shareholders participated in the 2026 annual meeting on April 28, 2026, where they re-elected all eleven director nominees, approved executive compensation, and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent auditor. Despite some opposition to two directors, the overall sentiment signaled strong support for the company's governance and financial oversight. RRX stock currently holds a "Neutral" rating from TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, due to its high valuation and low dividend yield, although strong cash flow and improving profitability are considered positives.

feed.title: Regal Rexnord (RRX) 2026 annual meeting approves directors, pay and auditor
feed.summary: Regal Rexnord Corporation announced the results of its 2026 annual meeting of shareholders, where all eleven director nominees were elected. Shareholders also approved executive compensation on an advisory basis and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for the year ending December 31, 2026. The meeting saw high shareholder turnout, with 63,726,776 shares represented.

feed.title: Rackspace Technology (NASDAQ: RXT) 2025 10-K: Hybrid cloud focus, Rackspace AI push
feed.summary: Rackspace Technology filed its 2025 10-K report, highlighting its focus on end-to-end hybrid cloud and AI solutions for regulated and mission-critical environments. The report details a market valuation of $131 million as of June 30, 2025, with 246,914,399 shares outstanding as of March 2, 2026, and a workforce of approximately 5,000 employees serving over 75,000 customers globally. Key financial disclosures include net losses of $837.8 million (2023), $858.2 million (2024), and $225.8 million (2025), alongside a detailed breakdown of Public Cloud and Private Cloud segment performance.

feed.title: Vanguard holds 5.22% of RLI Corp common stock (NYSE: RLI)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a 5.22% beneficial ownership stake in RLI Corp (NYSE: RLI), totaling 4,804,363 shares as of March 31, 2026. The Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole voting power over 693,420 shares and sole dispositive power over all 4,804,363 shares. The filing was signed on April 30, 2026, by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration.

feed.title: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc. announced strong first quarter 2026 results, exceeding expectations with record consolidated revenue of $664.6 million and net income of $69.4 million. The company reported record Adjusted EBITDAre of $219.3 million and increased its full-year outlook due to the robust performance. Highlights include significant room night bookings for future periods at an increased ADR and the planned development of a new Ole Red location.

feed.title: Ryan Specialty (NYSE: RYAN) director receives 5,757 vested RSUs as board pay
feed.summary: Ryan Specialty Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: RYAN) director Michelle L. Collins reported receiving a grant of 5,757 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) as compensation, not a market purchase. These RSUs vested immediately upon grant, though Collins elected to defer their settlement until her separation from the board. Following this transaction, she now directly holds 19,219 shares of Class A Common Stock, including 16,219 deferred RSUs.

feed.title: Director at Ryan Specialty (NYSE: RYAN) gets 5,757 stock units
feed.summary: Ryan Specialty Holdings, Inc. director Anthony J. Kuczinski reported receiving 5,757 Restricted Stock Units (Class A Common Stock) which vested immediately. The settlement of these units, recorded at $0.00 per share, has been deferred until his separation from the board of directors. After this grant, Kuczinski's direct holdings increased to 10,072 shares, with an additional 8,080 previously vested RSUs also deferred.

feed.title: Ryan Specialty (RYAN) director receives 5,757 deferred RSUs grant
feed.summary: Ryan Specialty Holdings, Inc. director David P. Bolger was granted 5,757 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) that vested immediately upon grant at $0.00 per share. Settlement of these RSUs is deferred until his separation from service on the board. Following this grant, Bolger holds 20,580 Class A shares directly and 66,467 Class A shares indirectly through a trust.

feed.title: 8,000 Rush Enterprises (NASDAQ: RUSHA) Class A shares proposed sale
feed.summary: Rush Enterprises has filed a Form 144 notice disclosing a proposed sale of 8,000 shares of Class A Common Stock. This transaction stems from an exercise of employee stock options via a broker-assisted cashless exercise on April 30, 2026. The filing also references a prior sale of 8,000 shares by Michael McRoberts on February 19, 2026, for $566,469.96.

feed.title: Rush Enterprises (NASDAQ: RUSHA) affiliate to sell 30,000 Class A shares
feed.summary: An affiliate of Rush Enterprises (NASDAQ: RUSHA) has filed a Form 144 to propose the sale of 30,000 Class A common shares. The intended sale date is April 30, 2026, and the method specified is a broker-assisted cashless exercise. The filing also notes prior vesting events for Class B restricted stock units in March 2023.

feed.title: Royal Gold to Participate in the Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series on Tuesday, May 12, 2026
feed.summary: Royal Gold, Inc. announced its management will participate in Renmark Financial Communications Inc.'s Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series. Alistair Baker, Senior Vice President of Investor Relations and Business Development, will present on Tuesday, May 12, at 12:00 p.m. ET. A replay of the event will be available on the company's website and Renmark Financial Communications' website.

feed.title: Shareholders back RPC Inc (NYSE: RES) directors, auditor and incentive plan
feed.summary: RPC Inc. shareholders approved all proposals at their 2026 Annual Meeting, including the election of ten directors, the ratification of Grant Thornton LLP as their auditor for 2026, and advisory approval of executive compensation. They also ratified prior performance stock unit grants to the CEO and Executive Chairman and approved amendments to the 2024 Stock Incentive Plan. Gary Kolstad was appointed Chairman of the Human Capital Management and Compensation Committee and also joined the Audit Committee.

feed.title: Renasant Corp (RNST) director receives 2,060 restricted stock award under 2020 plan
feed.summary: Renasant Corp (RNST) director Connie L. Engel was granted 2,060 shares of common stock as a service-based restricted stock award under the company’s 2020 Long Term Incentive Plan. These shares were awarded at no cash cost and are scheduled to vest on April 27, 2027. Following this grant, Engel directly holds a total of 16,706 Renasant Corp common shares, reflecting a compensation-related equity award rather than an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Reynolds Consumer Products declares $0.23 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. (NASDAQ:REYN) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per common share, payable on May 29, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company, known for household products like Reynolds Wrap and Hefty, recently reported Q4 2025 earnings of $0.59 per share with revenue slightly exceeding forecasts at $1.03 billion, despite a slight pre-market stock decline.

feed.title: [8-K] Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. has reported the results of its Annual Meeting of Stockholders held on April 29, 2026, via an 8-K filing. Shareholders approved the election of three Class II directors, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026, and passed an advisory vote to approve the compensation of named executive officers. The filing details the specific vote counts for each proposal, indicating strong shareholder support for all presented items.

feed.title: [8-K] RLJ Lodging Trust Reports Material Event
feed.summary: RLJ Lodging Trust has reported the results of its 2026 annual shareholder meeting where a new long-term incentive plan was approved. Shareholders re-elected nine trustees, ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the auditor for 2026, and gave advisory approval to the executive compensation program. The newly approved 2026 Equity Incentive Plan replaces the 2021 plan and authorizes up to 4,763,000 common shares for future stock-based compensation, becoming effective on April 24, 2026, and running for up to ten years.

feed.title: Robert Half Announces Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Robert Half Inc. announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.59 per share on the company's common stock. The dividend is payable on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on May 22, 2026. Robert Half is a leading specialized talent solutions and business consulting firm, recognized for its workplace culture and innovative practices.

feed.title: Robert Half declares $0.59 quarterly dividend By Investing.com
feed.summary: Robert Half Inc. has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.59 per share, maintaining an impressive 8.87% yield and marking 22 consecutive years of dividend increases. Despite a 35% stock decline over the past year and recent underperforming revenues, the company's Q1 2026 EPS exceeded forecasts, and its stock is considered undervalued by InvestingPro. Jefferies, however, lowered its price target due to automation risks.

feed.title: RenovoRx (RNXT) 2026 proxy: board elections, equity pool increase and auditor vote
feed.summary: RenovoRx, Inc. (RNXT) has issued its 2026 proxy statement detailing proposals for its Annual Meeting on June 30, 2026. Stockholders will vote on electing six directors, increasing the shares available under the 2021 Omnibus Equity Incentive Plan by 2,000,000 (4.4% of total outstanding shares), and ratifying Frank, Rimerman + Co. LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for 2026. The proxy also outlines executive compensation for 2025, with CEO Shaun R. Bagai receiving over $1.2 million, and provides details on the company's board structure, committee responsibilities, and director independence.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (RBA) holds 9.3% of RB Global Inc common stock
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management reported a 9.3% stake in RB Global Inc, holding 17,296,264 shares as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates a passive investment with sole dispositive power over all shares and sole voting power over 3,987,887 shares. The filing specifies that the ownership includes securities held by Vanguard funds and managed accounts.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Edward Hoffman Sells 15,000 Shares of Radian Group Inc (RDN)
feed.summary: Edward Hoffman, Senior Executive Vice President and General Counsel at a Radian Group Inc subsidiary, sold 15,000 shares of RDN on April 29, 2026. This transaction reduces Hoffman's holdings to 108,708 shares. Radian Group Inc, trading at $37 per share, is considered fairly valued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.13.

feed.title: Arcadia Biosciences (NASDAQ: RKDA) details 2025 board, compensation and option deal
feed.summary: Arcadia Biosciences filed an amendment to its 2025 annual report, detailing board and committee structure, executive and non-employee director compensation (including option grants), and related-party transactions, without updating previous financial results. Key figures include CEO Thomas J. Schaefer's 2025 total compensation of $300,001 and audit fees of $892,001. The report also highlights a January 2026 inducement transaction where major holders exercised preferred investment options for approximately $2.1 million in cash and received new preferred investment options.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NYSE: RICK) reports 5.05% ownership in RCI Hospitality
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 5.05% beneficial ownership stake in RCI Hospitality Holdings Inc (RICK), amounting to 390,104 shares of common stock. The SEC filing, a Schedule 13G, indicates that Vanguard holds sole voting power for 50,655 shares and sole dispositive power for all 390,104 shares. The report disclaims any intent to influence or change the control of the issuer.

feed.title: Adamas Trust downgraded by B. Riley Securities with a new price target
feed.summary: B. Riley Securities has downgraded Adamas Trust (ADAM) and set a new price target of $9.50. This update follows their previous rating with a $9.00 price target. The report provides a summary of recent SEC filings and press releases related to Adamas Trust, including their first-quarter 2026 results and dividend declaration.

feed.title: James Klein Sells 310 Shares of QCR (NASDAQ:QCRH) Stock
feed.summary: James Klein, an insider at QCR Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:QCRH), sold 310 shares of the company's stock on April 30th at an average price of $91.00, totaling $28,210. This transaction reduced his ownership by 42.01% to 428 shares. QCR recently reported an EPS of $1.99, beating estimates, but revenue missed expectations, while the company also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.10 per share.

feed.title: Relay Therapeutics (RLAY) executive sells 753 shares to cover RSU taxes
feed.summary: Relay Therapeutics executive Peter Rahmer sold 753 shares of common stock at $14.79 per share. This non-discretionary sale was solely to cover income tax withholding obligations from the vesting of 3,051 restricted stock units. After the transaction, Rahmer still directly owns 275,857 shares, including 9,153 shares underlying RSUs, indicating the sale was a small portion of his total holdings.

feed.title: QCR Holdings (NASDAQ: QCRH) president sells 310 shares at $91
feed.summary: BÖRSE TITAN rapporte que James D. Klein, Président de CRBT chez QCR Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: QCRH), a vendu 310 actions ordinaires sur le marché libre à 91,00 $ l'action. Après cette transaction, il détient directement 428 actions et 5 838 actions supplémentaires via un compte géré. L'article détaille également les chiffres clés de la transaction, les définitions des termes financiers clés, et inclut le formulaire 4 de la SEC pour cette transaction, ainsi que des informations supplémentaires sur QCR Holdings.

feed.title: Joshua Hug 10b5-1 sales disclosed (RELY) — multiple trades Mar–Apr 2026
feed.summary: Joshua David Hug reported proposed sales of 16,800 shares of Remitly Global, Inc. (RELY) common stock on Form 144, stemming from previously exercised stock options. The filing also discloses multiple completed 10b5-1 plan trades between March and April 2026, handled by Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC. These transactions indicate routine insider sales activity, with a neutral impact and sentiment according to Rhea-AI.

feed.title: Redwire Corporation to Report First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6, 2026
feed.summary: Redwire Corporation announced it will report its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. A conference call will be held on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 9 a.m. ET to review the results, with access details provided for both call and live stream. A replay of the call and webcast will be available for two weeks following the event.

feed.title: Is NRG’s ESOP Shelf, Tender Offer and Dividend Strategy Altering The Investment Case For NRG (NRG)?
feed.summary: NRG Energy has filed a US$745.05 million shelf registration for an ESOP-related offering and affirmed a quarterly dividend of US$0.475 per share. The company also completed an early tender for Lightning Power's senior secured notes, impacting its balance sheet flexibility. These actions, especially the ESOP shelf registration, are seen as influencing NRG's long-term investment narrative and cash-return thesis, while the upcoming earnings report remains a key short-term factor.

feed.title: MetLife, Inc. Non Cum Red Perp Pfd Registered Shs Series D Financial Statements – GETTEX:A19YH3
feed.summary: This article provides financial statements and basic company information for MetLife, Inc. Non Cum Red Perp Pfd Registered Shs Series D (GETTEX:A19YH3). It details the company's segments including Group Benefits, Retirement and Income Solutions, and Asia, and notes that the security has never paid dividends. The article also highlights the absence of market capitalization, revenue, or net income data for this specific security.

feed.title: Does Surging AI Infrastructure Demand and Boost Run Deal Change The Bull Case For Dell (DELL)?
feed.summary: Dell Technologies recently showcased its AI-focused servers and infrastructure solutions at Hannover Messe 2026, alongside news of a multi-billion-dollar AI infrastructure agreement. These developments highlight Dell's increasing involvement in enterprise AI workloads, reinforcing the company's investment narrative focused on AI infrastructure demand offsetting margin pressures from traditional hardware. Investors are assessing whether these AI gains can counter the ongoing challenges in the PC and commoditized hardware markets, especially considering the potential for lower margins on high-volume AI deals.
